scripts.serve: bun x concurrently -n "api,web" -c "cyan,magenta" "cd api && bun start" "cd web && bun run serve"
scripts.dev: bun x concurrently -n "api,web" -c "cyan,magenta" "cd api && bun start" "cd web && bun run dev -- --host"
scripts.build: cd api && bun install && cd ../web && bun install && bun run build
